introSection: Kraken's Revenge is a steel water roller coaster located at Desaru Coast Adventure Waterpark in Bandar Penawar, Johor, Malaysia.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is a clone of Skatteøen at Djurs Sommerland in Denmark.

fullText:
Kraken's Revenge is a steel water roller coaster located at Desaru Coast Adventure Waterpark in Bandar Penawar, Johor, Malaysia.

The ride is a clone of Skatteøen at Djurs Sommerland in Denmark.
